reviews.review_title: Good concept, with one major flaw
reviews.review_description: This game is pretty good in all aspects with great potentials, except for one major flaw: Each enemy/target takes multiple hits to kill/destroy, but there is no auto function (or if it is there I can't find it), meaning you'd have to pull the trigger for every shot. It may not sound too bad, but it requires pulling the trigger hundreds of times just to get through one level, which is EXTREMELY tiring. I hope the developer could either make the enemies easier to kill with 1-2 shots, or add an auto function, otherwsie it is just not playable and I'd have to get a refund. I'll wait till it is closer to the end of the 14-day trial period.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for trying my game! I really appreciate your feedback, and I just finished an update that adds a new "auto shoot" option to the settings menu (released as of 4/28/2023). If you have any other feedback, I'd love to hear it. Just email me at tanner@wondersensegames.com. Thanks Again! - Tanner
